description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of dark gray and natural wood exterior finishes. The front facade features a spacious balcony with wooden railings, large windows, and a covered porch area supported by wooden columns. The house has a mix of horizontal and vertical window arrangements, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear and side elevations are more subdued, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The main entryway is accentuated by a wooden slatted screen and a small set of steps leading to the front door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of contemporary and natural materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray and wood exterior, large windows, and a prominent balcony. The design features clean lines, a covered porch, and a visually striking entryway.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the balcony with wooden railings, large windows, a covered porch, and the main entryway with a slatted wooden screen.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the vertical window arrangement, the continuation of the balcony, and the transition between wood and dark gray exterior panels.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a more solid facade with fewer windows, a back door, and utility elements like bins, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals a mix of window sizes, a wooden privacy fence, and the extension of the flat roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wooden slatted screen, small steps, a covered porch, and a modern door with minimal decorative elements.
